Title: Wall Pattern
Description: Checks if there is a wall next to the world position. For a simple Wall configuration, use BlockType or BlockSet Patterns in those slots. You can specify which directions are valid for the wall using the N, S, E, W string values.

Options.Label: Directions
Options.Direction:
N | S | E | W
Directions in which the wall can be facing.

Options.Label: RequireAllDirections
Options.Direction: If true then all the directions you put in the list need to validate for the Pattern to validate a position. Otherwise only one of the list directions needs to validate.

Outputs.Label: Wall
Outputs.Description: Validates the coordinate next to the Origin position.

Outputs.Label: Origin
Outputs.Description: Validates the coordinate at the Origin position.
